import json
import os


# tests/conftest.py (shared fixtures)
def load_test_fixture(filename):
    fixtures_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "fixtures")
    path = os.path.join(fixtures_dir, filename)
    with open(path) as f:
        return json.load(f)


def create_test_user(db, name="Test User", email="test@example.com"):
    user = db.create_user(name=name, email=email)
    db.session.commit()
    return user


# tests/test_api.py
from tests.conftest import create_test_user, load_test_fixture


def test_list_users():
    fixture = load_test_fixture("users.json")
    user = create_test_user(db)
    assert user.name == "Test User"


# tests/test_models.py
from tests.conftest import create_test_user, load_test_fixture


def test_user_model():
    fixture = load_test_fixture("users.json")
    user = create_test_user(db, name="Model User")
    assert user.email == "test@example.com"
